meaning: n.(尤指对别人的意见)不能忍耐,不容异说,偏狭,[医](对食物,药物等)不耐性
examples: Intolerance does not stem from disagreement.
Intolerance should not be confused with disagreement.
None of these reasons is an excuse for allowing the intolerance to continue.
At six weeks old she was diagnosed with an intolerance to cow's milk and developed meningitis.
Pirro, a Republican, urged passage of the measure to "send a message" against intolerance.
